prediction.reasoning: Based on typical daily stock price volatility for large-cap stocks like UPS, I estimated a daily standard deviation of approximately 1.5% ($1.74). The point estimate assumes minimal drift over one day. Confidence intervals are constructed using normal distribution assumptions with increasing widths for higher confidence levels (67%, 128%, and 165% of one standard deviation respectively).
